title: Need and overhaul on our I firs
excerpt: I first got Monday.com when I was a brand new company with only three employees. A year and a half later we have 22 employees 4 departments and each department manages 11 to 20 projects at a time That could involve a num…

posts.author: ash117 (Ashley Flowers)
posts.cookedHtml:
I first got Monday.com when I was a brand new company with only three employees. A year and a half later we have 22 employees 4 departments and each department manages 11 to 20 projects at a time That could involve a number of outside partners that need to collaborate.
we grew so fast that we couldn’t figure out how to keep monday.com on pace with us and now I’m confident we’re only scratching the surface on its capabilities.
i’m looking for a consulting company that can come in and rebuild all of our Monday boards based on our new processes. and ideally I’d like someone that can come do that in person. We are based in Indianapolis Indiana.
does anyone have any recommendations?

posts.author: AnthonytheEngineer (Anthony Gude)
posts.cookedHtml: Happy to assist and I had the same exact scenario. I can not do in person though, I am based out of SD.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ash117 and welcome to the community! Although we would not be able to help you in person (we are based outside of Toronto) we have helped numerous clients worldwide on a variety of use cases. Project Management is our sweet spot and can help you get all of your various boards under control and setup for fantastic reporting via overview boards and dashboards. Also, we focus heavily on resource utilization and health.

If you are open to working with someone remotely, please reach out to me here or shoot a message to info@greenllamas.com. Also, check us out online to learn more about what we do!

Thanks!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ash117

Welcome to the community! My team and I specialise in helping our clients get the most out of their Monday.com set up. Most of them come to us with the same problem you have…

I’ve personally specialised in Monday.com for over three years and love the software! I also have a background in management and projects, allowing me to streamline my clients’ processes with ease! On my team, I also have another Monday specialist, project manager and a developer/Zapier expert, so you will never have to wait for answers.

I offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to review your current set up, and I can show you options going forward. You can book a session through this link.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Elena
Kick Consulting

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ashley,
If you are still on the lookout for some help, feel free to reach out to me as what you are wanting is well within my skill set.
You can reach me on andrewjohnson56782@gmail.com
Best Wishes and Have a great Friday,
Andrew

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m a little late to the game here, but let me know if you are still looking for someone. I’m actually in Zionsville, but my monday.com implementation consultants are in Nashville and Santa Cruz. There are so many great monday.com partners here, but if you are still looking please feel free to contact me jenna.mackillop@iointegration.com.
